AI is analyzing the current context...
API Key（已保存，留空保持不变）: API Key (saved; leave blank to keep)
MSSH 原生 CSV，字段可直接对应。: Native MSSH CSV; fields map directly.
MinIO、Ceph 等兼容服务通常需要开启。: Usually required for MinIO, Ceph, and compatible services.
Mode。终端颜色将保持固定，不受界面模式影响。: Mode. Terminal colors stay fixed and do not follow the UI mode.
Unix 下默认附加 -l；若自定义了启动参数则不再自动附加。: On Unix, appends -l by default; custom startup arguments disable automatic -l.
WebGL 不可用时会自动回退到 Canvas，再失败则使用 DOM。默认 DO: Falls back to Canvas when WebGL is unavailable, then to DOM. Defaults to DOM.
。每个节点会独立执行，失败不会中断其他节点。: . Each node runs independently; failures do not stop the others.
一个外部表头只能对应一个 MSSH 字段；未映射字段使用默认值。: Each external header maps to at most one MSSH field; unmapped fields use defaults.
不选标签将清空全部标签: Leaving tags empty clears all tags
两次输入的密码不一致: The two passwords do not match
个会话，并在单个事务中提交。: sessions, committed in a single transaction.
中文、English、数字与符号预览: Chinese, English, digits, and symbols preview
串口使用中，请先关闭终端再删除: Serial port is in use. Close the terminal before deleting.
串口终端为设备独占，不支持分屏: Serial terminals exclusively own the device and cannot be split.
主机密钥已变更，连接已阻止。如确认服务器已重装或密钥轮换，请在安全设置中删除旧指: Host key changed; connection blocked. If the server was rebuilt or rotated keys, delete the old fingerprint in Security settings and retry.
主题 Profile 缺少颜色定义: Theme profile is missing color definitions
主题设置保存失败，已恢复原主题: Failed to save theme settings; restored previous theme
也可双击侧边栏会话列表中的主机开始连接: Or double-click a host in the sidebar to connect
二次验证可防止已解锁设备被他人直接导出明文密码。: Step-up verification prevents exporting plaintext passwords from an unlocked device without the app password.
云同步使用“设置 → 安全”中的应用密码加密备份。请先配置应用密码，并在各设备保: Cloud sync encrypts backups with the application password from Settings → Security. Configure it first and keep it identical on every device.
仅允许系统认可的 Shell（Unix 参考 /etc/shells）。: Only system-approved shells are allowed (Unix uses /etc/shells).
仅导出 SSH 会话、分组和资产归属，不包含 MSSH 应用设置。: Exports only SSH sessions, folders, and asset ownership — not app settings.
仅调整应用界面。终端排版请在“终端”分类中配置。: Affects the app UI only. Configure terminal typography under Terminal.
从 SFTP 文件面板开始上传或下载后，任务会显示在这里。: Transfers started from the SFTP panel appear here.
从当前终端上下文开始提问。模型不会自动执行命令，命令必须逐条审批。: Ask from the current terminal context. The model never auto-runs commands; approve each one.
会清空会话、密钥、隧道、宏与资产归属数据。操作前将创建恢复点，审计日志和同步配置: This clears sessions, keys, tunnels, macros, and asset ownership. A restore point is created first; audit logs and sync settings are kept.
会话保活仅维持底层 SSH 连接，不能控制服务端 Shell 的空闲自动登出策略: Keep-alive only maintains the SSH connection; it does not control remote shell idle logout.
会话可能因空闲超时、进程退出或网络中断而结束，可在当前终端中重新连接。: The session may have ended due to idle timeout, process exit, or network interruption. You can reconnect in the current terminal.
作为所有终端主题的默认字体、光标样式和选区高亮配置。: Default font, cursor style, and selection highlight for all terminal themes.
使用右上角按钮创建第一个: Use the top-right button to create the first one
使用系统环境变量中的 HTTP(S)_PROXY / ALL_PROXY。: Uses HTTP(S)_PROXY / ALL_PROXY from the system environment.
保存 Provider、密钥或同步策略后才能执行同步。: Save the provider, credentials, or sync policy before syncing.
全局字体与光标配置不会被修改: Global font and cursor settings are not changed
关闭分屏失败: close failed: Failed to close split: close failed
关闭后可为当前主题单独设置字体、光标样式和选区背景色；光标颜色始终属于主题。: When off, this theme can override font, cursor style, and selection background; cursor color always belongs to the theme.
关闭当前活动标签（活动连接需手动确认）。: Close the active tab (active connections require confirmation).
关闭标签失败: connection lost: Failed to close tab: connection lost
关闭标签失败: 回放清理失败: Failed to close tab: playback cleanup failed
其中 ${} 个会话和 ${} 个子分组将迁移到默认分组。: ${} sessions and ${} subfolders will move to the default folder.
其中 1 个会话和 0 个子分组将迁移到默认分组。: 1 session and 0 subfolders will move to the default folder.
内置主题的颜色和备用样式，并重新跟随全局字体与光标。全局字体与光标配置不会被修改: built-in theme colors and fallback styles, and follow global font/cursor again. Global font and cursor settings are not changed.
凭据保存到系统 Keychain。: Credentials are stored in the system keychain.
切换 Dark/Light 时，自动使用对应的终端主题。: Automatically switch terminal themes with Dark/Light mode.
创建分屏失败: open failed: Failed to create split: open failed
删除 ${} 的已信任主机指纹？下次连接时将重新确认。: Delete trusted fingerprint for ${}? It will be reconfirmed on next connect.
加密同步会话、密钥、隧道、宏、主题与资产归属数据。: Encrypt and sync sessions, keys, tunnels, macros, themes, and asset ownership.
匹配 MobaXterm 常见书签 CSV 字段。: Matches common MobaXterm bookmark CSV fields.
匹配 PuTTY 常见 CSV 转换字段。: Matches common PuTTY CSV conversion fields.
匹配 SecureCRT 常见会话清单字段。: Matches common SecureCRT session list fields.
单个标签最多支持 ${} 个终端窗格: A single tab supports up to ${} terminal panes
单个标签最多支持 8 个终端窗格: Each tab supports up to 8 terminal panes
即将为 2 个会话建立 SSH 连接: About to open SSH for 2 sessions
即将删除 ${} 个会话。将同时影响 ${} 条隧道、${} 条命令历史和 ${: About to delete ${} sessions. This will also affect ${} tunnels, ${} command history entries and ${} recordings. This cannot be undone.
即将删除 ${} 个会话。正在分析关联资产影响范围。此操作不可撤销。: About to delete ${} sessions. Analyzing impact on linked assets. This cannot be undone.
发现新版本，可前往发布页下载。: A new version is available. Open the release page to download.
只检测本机安装状态，不会向 SSH 服务器安装或执行 Agent。: Only checks local install status; does not install or run Agents on the SSH server.
可从列表选择，也可直接输入自定义波特率。: Pick a common value or enter a custom baud rate.
同步与加密导出依赖此密码派生的数据密钥，请在所有设备保持一致。: Sync and encrypted export use a data key derived from this password. Keep it identical on every device.
同步当前终端的 Shell 工作目录（需要处于 Shell 提示符）: Sync the current terminal shell working directory (requires a shell prompt)
同步数据已变更，热更新失败。是否重新加载应用？: Sync data changed but hot reload failed. Reload the application?
同类条件取并集，不同类别取交集。: Conditions of the same type are OR; different categories are AND.
名称会在会话列表、搜索和详情中即时生效。: The name applies immediately in the session list, search, and details.
名称和设备路径不能为空: Name and device path are required
启用审计日志后开始记录关键操作。: Enable audit logging to record key operations.
命令默认需要审批；内置高风险阻断规则始终生效。: Commands require approval by default; built-in high-risk block rules always apply.
在侧边栏「宏」中新增命令，或在此管理快捷命令模板。: Add commands in the sidebar Macros panel, or manage templates here.
在系统钥匙串中记住解锁状态（默认）: Remember unlock in the system keychain (default)
处理 2 行，最多展示 100 条明细，失败项优先。: Process 2 rows; showing up to 100 details, failures first.
备注关键词（仅显式筛选时匹配）: Notes keywords (matched only when filtering explicitly)
复制当前终端选中文本。: Copy the selected text in the current terminal.
如果远端 Shell 未发送工作目录信息，可在文件面板点击“同步当前目录”手动请: If the remote shell does not send working-directory info, click “Sync current directory” in the file panel to request it once.
字体、光标样式和选区背景色默认继承全局配置。: Font, cursor style, and selection background inherit global settings by default.
字体不能为空，且最多包含 256 个字符。: Font cannot be empty and may contain at most 256 characters.
字号必须是 8 到 48 的整数: Font size must be an integer between 8 and 48
字号必须是 8 到 48 的整数。: Font size must be an integer from 8 to 48.
存在快捷键冲突，已暂停自动保存。请先消除冲突后再继续。: Shortcut conflicts detected; auto-save is paused until conflicts are resolved.
宏加载失败: load failed: Failed to load macros: load failed
宏已发送到活动终端: Macro sent to the active terminal
密码将以明文写入 CSV。请仅保存到可信位置，并在使用后妥善删除。: Passwords are written to CSV in plain text. Save only to trusted locations and delete after use.
导入和重置会关闭活动连接；审计日志、同步记录和应用设置会保留。: Import and reset close active connections; audit logs, sync history, and app settings are kept.
将剪贴板内容粘贴到当前终端。: Paste clipboard content into the current terminal.
将同时影响 ${} 条隧道、${} 条命令历史和 ${} 条录制记录。: This will also affect ${} tunnels, ${} command history entries and ${} recordings.
将搜索结果作为模型上下文，并在回答中保留引用。: Use search results as model context and keep citations in the answer.
将移除该主题配置（Profile）。内置颜色定义会保留，不会被删除。: This removes the theme profile. Built-in color definitions are kept and will not be deleted.
将移除该主题配置（Profile）。若自定义颜色定义不再被引用，也会一并清理。此: This removes the theme profile. Unused custom color definitions will also be cleaned up. This cannot be undone.
尝试搜索名称、主机、用户、分组、环境、项目或标签: Try searching by name, host, user, folder, environment, project, or tag
已关闭标签「${}」以腾出终端池。可从会话列表重新连接该会话。: Closed tab “${}” to free the terminal pool. Reconnect from the session list.
已取消打开新终端：终端池已满且未释放现有标签: Cancelled opening a new terminal: pool is full and no tab was released
已安全保存，留空保持不变: Saved securely; leave blank to keep
已有 SSH 连接正在处理，请先完成或关闭当前连接窗口: An SSH connection is already in progress; finish or close the current connect dialog first
已达到 8 个终端窗格上限: Reached the limit of 8 terminal panes
已释放空闲终端实例以腾出连接池: Released idle terminal instances to free the pool
常用值可点选，也支持直接输入自定义数值。: Pick a common value or type a custom number.
应用密码至少需要 12 个字符: Application password must be at least 12 characters
应用已锁定。请输入应用密码以继续。: The application is locked. Enter the application password to continue.
开启“每次启动验证”后，将忽略记住的解锁状态。: When launch verification is enabled, remembered unlock is ignored.
当前主题配置无效，自动保存已暂停，请修正颜色或字体后继续。: Theme configuration is invalid; auto-save is paused until colors and fonts are fixed.
当前会话暂无隧道: No tunnels for the current session
当前已是最新版本。: You are already on the latest version.
当前界面为 Light Mode: Current UI mode is Light Mode
当前筛选条件下暂无审计记录。: No audit records for the current filters.
当前终端未连接，无法执行宏: The active terminal is not connected
当前绑定没有可重置的内置主题: No built-in theme to reset for the current assignment
录制文件将被永久删除。: The recording file will be permanently deleted.
恢复前会关闭活动终端与隧道，并自动创建恢复点。: restore before will closeactive terminals and tunnel, and autocreaterestore point.
恢复当前绑定内置主题的默认样式: Restore the default style of the current built-in theme assignment
意外断开后自动尝试重新连接；手动断开或关闭标签不会触发。默认关闭。: Automatically retries after unexpected disconnects. Manual disconnect or closing a tab does not trigger it. Off by default.
成功连接会话后会显示在这里。: successconnectsession after will show in here.
我有其他设备的加密备份: I have an encrypted backup from another device
所有应用 HTTP 请求直连目标主机。: All application HTTP requests connect directly.
所选标签仍有活动 SSH 连接或录制任务。关闭将终止远程会话且无法恢复。: The selected tabs still have active SSH connections or recordings. Closing will terminate remote sessions permanently.
打开一个本机交互 Shell 终端。: Open a local interactive shell terminal.
打开串口时拉高 DTR: Assert DTR when opening the port
打开串口时拉高 RTS: Assert RTS when opening the port
打开新建 SSH 会话流程。: Open the new SSH session flow.
按会话管理本地、远程和动态转发: Manage local, remote, and dynamic forwarding per session
按日期写入日志文件，并自动清理超出保留天数的旧日志。: Write daily log files and automatically prune files older than the retention window.
按通用别名预匹配，再逐项调整。: Pre-match common aliases, then adjust each field.
控制主窗口关闭按钮的默认行为。: Controls the default behavior of the main window close button.
控制右侧 AI 面板携带的上下文和对话保留方式。: Controls context carried by the right AI panel and how chats are retained.
控制终端中的鼠标、剪贴板、历史缓冲与连接恢复策略。: Controls mouse, clipboard, scrollback, and connection recovery behavior in terminals.
控制终端中的鼠标、剪贴板与历史缓冲。: Control mouse, clipboard, and history buffer behavior in the terminal.
控制终端中的鼠标和剪贴板交互。: Controls mouse and clipboard interaction in the terminal.
控制终端连接池容量、SSH 保活与默认 TERM 类型。: Controls terminal pool capacity, SSH keep-alive, and the default TERM type.
控制远程文件面板的显示方式和目录联动行为。: Controls remote file panel display and directory follow behavior.
控制鼠标选中文本时的背景高亮颜色。: Controls the highlight color when selecting text with the mouse.
描述要排查或执行的运维任务: Describe the ops task to investigate or run
搜索 API Key（已保存，留空保持不变）: search API Key (saved, leave blankkeep unchanged)
搜索名称、主机、用户、分组、环境、项目或标签: Search by name, host, user, folder, environment, project, or tag
搜索名称、主机、用户、分组或资产: Search by name, host, user, folder, or assets
支持 CSS 字体族列表，缺失字形会依次使用后续字体。: Supports CSS font-family lists; missing glyphs fall through to later fonts.
支持 MSSH 以及常见 PuTTY、SecureCRT、MobaXterm C: Supports MSSH and common PuTTY, SecureCRT, and MobaXterm CSV fields. Export vendor-native configs to CSV first.
支持 http、https、socks5 协议。: Supports http, https, and socks5 schemes.
文件选择器默认打开用户家目录下的 .ssh 文件夹。: The file picker opens the .ssh folder under the user home directory by default.
显示名称以点号开头的文件和目录。: Show files and directories whose names start with a dot.
暂无串口配置，点击右上角新建: No serial profiles yet. Create one from the top-right.
暂无可用密钥，请先在总览 → 密钥配置中导入: No keys available. Import keys under Overview → Key settings first
暂无标签，请先创建。: No tags yet. Create one first.
未检测到设备，仍可手动填写路径: No devices detected; you can still enter a path manually
本地/动态隧道仅允许绑定回环地址，避免意外对局域网暴露服务。: Local/dynamic tunnels may only bind loopback addresses to avoid accidental LAN exposure.
本地/动态隧道只能绑定回环地址（127.0.0.1、::1、localhost）: Local/dynamic tunnels may only bind loopback addresses (127.0.0.1, ::1, localhost)
本地与云端都发生了变化: Both local and cloud data changed
查看当前运行周期的上传与下载任务。: View upload and download tasks for the current run.
根据本会话历史命令预测当前输入，按 Tab 补全剩余内容。开启后会拦截 Tab: Predict the current input from this session's command history and complete the rest with Tab. When enabled, Tab is intercepted for completion. Off by default.
正在为当前终端创建新的 SSH 通道。: Creating a new SSH channel for the current terminal.
正在为当前终端创建新的连接通道。: Creating a new connection channel for the current terminal.
每个标签最多支持 8 个终端窗格: Each tab supports up to 8 terminal panes
每次启动都要求输入应用密码: Require application password on every launch
每次打开 SFTP 文件面板时采用的初始视图。: Initial view each time the SFTP file panel opens.
波特率需在 300 到 4000000 之间: Baud rate must be between 300 and 4,000,000
活动终端和隧道将被关闭，当前数据会先保存为恢复点。: Active terminals and tunnels will be closed; current data is saved as a restore point first.
清空当前终端可见内容。: Clear the visible content of the current terminal.
热更新失败。是否重新加载应用？: Hot reload failed. Reload the application?
版本文件将永久删除，当前同步基线不能删除。: The version file will be permanently deleted. The current sync baseline cannot be deleted.
用于云同步、AI 提供商与检查更新等应用网络请求，不影响 SSH ProxyCo: Applies to cloud sync, AI providers, and update checks. Does not affect SSH ProxyCommand/ProxyJump.
留空则使用用户家目录。: Leave empty to use the user home directory.
留空则使用系统默认（Unix: $SHELL，Windows: ComSpec/: Leave empty to use the system default (Unix: $SHELL, Windows: ComSpec/cmd.exe).
确认删除串口配置「${}」？此操作不可撤销。: Delete serial profile “${}”? This cannot be undone.
确认删除选中的 ${} 个串口配置？此操作不可撤销。: Delete ${} selected serial profiles? This cannot be undone.
确认后将从所有关联会话移除此标签。: This will remove the tag from all linked sessions.
私钥属于敏感凭据。仅复制到可信位置，不要通过聊天、邮件或日志传输。: Private keys are sensitive. Copy only to trusted places; do not send via chat, email, or logs.
管理 SSH known_hosts 指纹。指纹变化时连接会被阻止。: Manage SSH known_hosts fingerprints. Connections are blocked when fingerprints change.
管理 SSH 身份与公私钥材料: Manage SSH identities and key material
管理串口设备配置，并一键打开串口终端: Manage serial device profiles and open serial terminals in one click
系统 Keychain 不可用，凭据仅保留到本次运行结束。: System keychain unavailable; credentials are kept only for this run.
系统代理读取环境变量；直连忽略代理；手动使用下方配置。: System uses environment variables; Direct ignores proxies; Manual uses the settings below.
组织多行命令，执行或仅粘贴到当前终端: Compose multi-line commands, then run or paste into the current terminal
终端主题配置不可用，请重新加载设置。: Terminal theme configuration unavailable. Reload settings.
终端发送 OSC 7 工作目录信息时，文件面板自动切换到该目录。: When the terminal sends OSC 7 working-directory info, the file panel follows that directory.
终端未返回 OSC 7 工作目录信息: Terminal did not return OSC 7 working-directory info
终端池已满。继续将关闭标签「${}」并断开对应连接，之后可从会话列表重新连接。是: Terminal pool is full. Continue will close tab “${}” and disconnect it; you can reconnect later from the session list. Continue?
终端池已满，用户取消释放现有终端: Terminal pool is full; user cancelled releasing an existing terminal
终端连接与交互偏好会自动保存。: Terminal connection and interaction preferences are saved automatically.
统一保护本机敏感数据与云同步备份。轮转密码会触发数据重新加密；非同设备若密码不一: Protects local sensitive data and cloud backups. Rotating re-encrypts data; other devices must use the same password or sync will fail.
统一维护环境、项目与标签目录。: Centrally manage environments, projects, and tags.
继续将关闭标签「${}」并断开对应连接，之后可从会话列表重新连接。是否继续？: Continuing will close tab "${}" and disconnect it. You can reconnect from the session list. Continue?
自动同步在应用启动后执行，并按设置的间隔持续运行。: Auto sync runs after app start and continues on the configured interval.
自定义全局快捷键。修改后自动保存；冲突项会以警告标出。macOS 使用 ⌘，Wi: Customize global shortcuts. Changes auto-save; conflicts are highlighted. macOS uses ⌘, Windows/Linux uses Ctrl.
至少 12 个字符，用于加密 .msshbackup；留空会保留已保存密钥。: At least 12 characters to encrypt .msshbackup; leave blank to keep the saved key.
行，最多展示 100 条明细，失败项优先。: rows; showing up to 100 details, failures first.
让文件面板跟随当前终端所在的远程目录。: Make the file panel follow the remote directory of the current terminal.
记录关键资产与连接操作，不保存密码、密钥或命令正文: Record key asset and connection actions without saving passwords, keys, or command bodies
记录连接测试、上传、下载、冲突和恢复操作。: Record connection tests, uploads, downloads, conflicts, and restores.
设备不回显时，在终端中本地显示已发送内容: Echo typed content locally when the device does not echo
该密钥被 ${} 个会话引用，删除后这些会话将无法使用密钥认证。仍要删除吗？: This key is used by ${} sessions. After deletion they can no longer use key auth. Delete anyway?
该快捷键被系统保留，请选择其他组合: This shortcut is reserved by the system. Choose another combination.
请使用标签关闭按钮确认终止活动连接: Use the tab close button to confirm terminating active connections
请先保存或撤销当前主题修改: Save or discard the current theme changes first
请先创建会话，再使用快速连接: Create a session before using quick connect
请先连接终端后再执行宏: Connect a terminal before running a macro
请确认已备份当前密码策略，并在所有同步设备上使用相同应用密码。: Confirm you have backed up your password policy and use the same app password on every synced device.
请输入 #RRGGBB 格式的颜色值: Enter a color value in #RRGGBB format
请选择本次冲突的处理方式；取消会保留当前状态。: Choose how to resolve this conflict; cancel keeps the current state.
调整筛选条件或创建第一个会话。: Adjust filters or create the first session.
超过保留天数的按日日志文件会被自动删除，默认 30 天。: Daily log files older than this many days are deleted automatically. Default is 30 days.
轮转应用密码会使用新密钥重新加密本地敏感数据（私钥、会话密码等）。其他设备必须使: Rotating re-encrypts local sensitive data (private keys, session passwords, etc.) with a new key. Other devices must use the same application password or sync will fail. Continue?
输入要发送到终端的内容…: Type content to send to the terminal…
还需要映射或填写：: Still need to map or fill in:
远程转发会在 SSH 服务端打开监听端口；绑定非回环地址时请确认安全边界。: Remote forwarding opens a listen port on the SSH server; confirm the security boundary when binding non-loopback addresses.
远程转发监听 0.0.0.0/:: 会在远端所有网卡上暴露端口，请确认安全边界。: Remote forwarding on 0.0.0.0/:: exposes the port on all remote interfaces; confirm the security boundary.
远程转发监听非回环地址会在远端网卡上暴露端口，请确认仅受信网络可访问。: Remote forwarding on a non-loopback address exposes the port on remote interfaces; allow only trusted networks.
远端会话可能因空闲超时或网络中断而结束，可在当前终端中重新连接。: The remote session may have ended due to idle timeout or network loss. You can reconnect in this terminal.
远端固定保存为 .msshbackup，同时只启用一个提供商。: Remote files are always saved as .msshbackup, and only one provider is enabled at a time.
连接尝试尚未就绪: Connection attempt is not ready yet
连接时应用到底层串口。DSR/DTR 在 Windows 启用硬件握手；Linu: Applied to the native serial port. DSR/DTR enables hardware handshake on Windows; on Linux/macOS only DTR/RTS levels are kept (no full DSR handshake).
连接时应用到底层串口：None / XON-XOFF 软件流控 / RTS-CT: Applied to the native port on connect: None / XON-XOFF software / RTS-CTS hardware / DSR-DTR hardware (full on Windows, best-effort on Linux).
选中文本后自动写入系统剪贴板。: Automatically copy selected text to the system clipboard.
选择一个色块后，在下方进行精确编辑。: Select a swatch, then fine-tune it below.
选择已检测到的串口，或手动填写设备路径（如 /dev/ttyUSB0、COM3）: Pick a detected serial device or enter a path manually (e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0, COM3).
选择当前列表全部会话: Select all sessions in the current list
选择显示操作菜单或直接粘贴剪贴板内容。: Show an action menu or paste clipboard content directly.
选择终端是否跟随应用模式，或固定使用一个独立主题。: Let the terminal follow the app mode, or pin an independent theme.
选择终端画面渲染后端。DOM 兼容性最好；Canvas / WebGL 在大量输: Choose the terminal rendering backend. DOM is most compatible; Canvas / WebGL are smoother with heavy output.
选择远程目录内容的可见范围。: Choose the visibility scope of remote directory contents.
通用设置包含界面外观与应用级偏好。: General settings cover interface appearance and app-level preferences.
配置 AI 可调用的网络搜索能力与凭据。: Configure web search capabilities and credentials available to AI.
配置串口连接参数并保存为可复用配置，可从这里直接打开串口终端。: Configure serial connection parameters as reusable profiles and open serial terminals from here.
配置本机交互 Shell 的默认路径、参数、工作目录与登录行为。: Configure the default path, arguments, working directory, and login behavior for the local interactive shell.
释放文件以上传到当前目录: Drop files to upload to the current directory
重启应用后自动恢复上次未关闭的终端标签。默认开启。: Automatically restores previously open terminal tabs after restart. On by default.
重复项按名称、主机、端口和用户名识别。未映射或空单元格使用默认值。: Duplicates are identified by name, host, port, and username. Unmapped or empty cells use defaults.
限制每个终端保留的输出历史行数，超出后丢弃最旧内容（${}-${}）。: Limit retained output history lines per terminal; oldest lines are dropped beyond the limit (${}-${}).
隐藏到系统托盘以保持连接，或直接退出应用。: Hide to the system tray to keep connections, or exit the app.
集中管理连接、分组、节点与资产分类: Centrally manage connections, folders, nodes, and asset categories
页面遇到意外错误。你可以重试恢复，或重新加载应用。: The page hit an unexpected error. Retry to recover, or reload the app.
首次使用需设置应用密码，用于加密本机敏感数据与云同步备份。: Set an application password on first use to encrypt local sensitive data and cloud backups.
首次推送可留空自动创建: Leave blank on first push to auto-create
默认为用户家目录下的 .mssh/logs，文件名形如 2026-07-15.l: Defaults to ~/.mssh/logs under the home directory, with names like 2026-07-15.log.
默认关闭。密钥认证仅导出公钥标识，不导出私钥。: Off by default. Key auth exports only public key identifiers, never private keys.
加载串口占用状态失败: ${}: Failed to load serial device usage: ${}
确认删除隧道「${}」？此操作不可撤销。: Delete tunnel "${}"? This cannot be undone.
批量删除串口配置失败: ${}: Failed to batch delete serial profiles: ${}
